text:
First off, in the book, Froglip's name is Harelip. Personally, I think Froglip flows better :) . 

So, Harelip's mother was a Sun-Woman that the King fell in love with. She died giving birth to Harelip (another reason why I like Froglip better than Harelip), and her shoes went to the next Queen...who was a bit of a creep to Harelip. So Harelip was half human. 

Froglip's mother could possibly be half human. I support that. Thus making Froglip quarter human XD .
